title: Germplasm assembly, conservation, and diversity of ICRISAT mandate crops
abstract:
One of ICRISAT's major objectibes is to act as a world repository
for the genetic resources of its mandate crops namely, sorghum (Sorglrnnr
bicolor). pearl millet (Ptlnnisetum americani~r~lp)i,g eon pea (Cajmirs cuja~z),
chickpea (Cicvr arirtittfrnl), and groundnut (..lrachis hjyogarn). The
